trackGoals.title: Track Your Goals
trackGoals.description: Set meaningful financial, health, and career goals. Break them down into achievable key results.

habits.title: Build Better Habits
habits.description: Turn your goals into daily routines. Track streaks, build momentum, and celebrate small wins every day.

aiInsights.title: AI-Powered Insights
aiInsights.description: Get smart recommendations, weekly reviews, and a personal AI coach to help you stay on track.
